author: spencer_tb
content: happy with source based so no push back as feels more correct, reservoir based I prefer from testing aspect as having one source for all refunds is simpler

author: draganrakita
content: From impl side, either case is fine. I lean on returning it in reservoir, but it is weak opinion, source base is fine too.

author: garyrong
content:
In the current spec, we reset the reservoir back to its initial value on exceptional halt. What it does under the hood is: calculate the spilled amount into the regular, burn it alongside other regular if spill is non-zero. 

What it does is essentially source-based.

IMO, if we want to do this, source-based mechanism is better.
